author: Tertullian

lineage: We Must Be Free Likewise from All Mental Perturbation.

ccel.title: ANF03. Latin Christianity: Its Founder, Tertullian

source.title: ANF03. Latin Christianity: Its Founder, Tertullian

title: We Must Be Free Likewise from All Mental Perturbation.

source.title: ANF03. Latin Christianity: Its Founder, Tertullian

verses.text: Nor merely from anger, but altogether from all perturbation of mind, ought the exercise of prayer to be free, uttered from a spirit such as the Spirit unto whom it is sent.
For a defiled spirit cannot be acknowledged by a holy Spirit, nor a sad by a joyful, nor a fettered by a free.
No one grants reception to his adversary: no one grants admittance except to his compeer.
